message:
feat(web): update complete-guide page and guide components from concurrent development

Updates to the complete-guide section reflecting ongoing concurrent agent
work on the ACFS web application learning experience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -143,7 +143,7 @@ function Hero() {

- The definitive system for operating AI agent swarms. Master the methodology to transition from human intent to flawless execution. + The definitive system for operating AI agent swarms. Master the methodology to transition from human intent to flawless execution.

@@ -246,7 +246,7 @@ export default function CompleteGuidePage() { The markdown plan is where the big thinking happens. , <> - The beads are how that thinking gets packaged for execution + The beads are how that thinking gets packaged for execution by many agents. , <> @@ -368,7 +368,7 @@ export default function CompleteGuidePage() { , <> The swarm launches. Agents read AGENTS.md, register - with Agent Mail, claim beads, and use bv. + with Agent Mail, claim beads, and use bv. , <> The human tends flow, not code details. @@ -725,7 +725,7 @@ export default function CompleteGuidePage() {

Once you have a functioning v1, adding new features follows the same process: create a detailed markdown plan, turn it into beads, and - implement. The flywheel just spins again. + implement. The flywheel just spins again.

Debates about architecture and approach belong in the planning stage so @@ -745,7 +745,7 @@ export default function CompleteGuidePage() { icon={} >

- ACFS is a “Rails installer” for agentic engineering. A beginner + ACFS is a “Rails installer” for agentic engineering. A beginner with a credit card and a laptop can paste one{" "} curl | bash command and start vibe coding within minutes.

@@ -839,7 +839,7 @@ alias gmi='gemini --yolo'`} items={[ <> Web apps: TypeScript, Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind, - Supabase, Rust/WASM for performance-critical parts + Supabase, Rust/WASM for performance-critical parts , <> CLI tools: Golang or Rust @@ -1304,7 +1304,7 @@ br sync --flush-only # Export to JSONL`}

- After Claude Code polishing rounds are complete, run one final round using Codex with + After Claude Code polishing rounds are complete, run one final round using Codex with GPT (high reasoning effort) using the same polishing prompt. Different models have different blind spots. This final pass consistently catches things Claude missed.
